overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in ornate golden armor exploring a moody, autumnal fantasy wilderness path toward a Minor Erdtree. The scene features overcast dusk lighting, scattered ancient stone ruins, glowing red ember particles floating in the air, and a foreboding atmosphere with steep cliff edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruin path toward Minor Erdtree

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the Minor Erdtree visible in the distance, passing scattered ancient stone ruins

entered.detail: massive glowing tree structure towering in the distance with golden light emanating from its branches
broken stone archways and crumbling walls lining the path
trees with orange and yellow foliage scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a wide dirt trail through an open fantasy wilderness. Ancient stone ruins line both sides of the path while a massive Minor Erdtree glows in the distant center. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with floating red ember particles drifting through the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with large boulders

events.description: path becomes more enclosed by large rock formations and dense autumn foliage

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain with large boulders, maintaining steady pace along the winding trail

entered.detail: massive grey rock formation emerging on the left side of the path
ancient stone sarcophagus lying beside the trail
steep drop-off becoming visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail winds through a rockier section of the landscape with massive boulders flanking the path. The Minor Erdtree shifts to the left as the path curves, and a steep cliff edge becomes visible on the right. Ancient stone ruins fall behind as the character approaches a stone coffin lying beside the trail.

events.description: character navigates around the stone coffin on the left side of the path
path narrows along cliff edge with steep drop now prominent on right side

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow cliffside path, passing the stone coffin and continuing through denser forest

entered.detail: thick cluster of dark trees and underbrush lining the left side of the narrow path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a cliffside trail with a steep drop visible on the right. The character passes the stone coffin and continues through denser forest vegetation. The Minor Erdtree remains visible to the left, now appearing closer as the character progresses along the winding cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wilderness trail that transitions from an open ruin-lined path into a narrow, precarious cliffside route. It begins with the character walking a wide dirt trail flanked by ancient stone ruins, while a massive, glowing Minor Erdtree looms in the distance under a moody, overcast sky filled with drifting red embers. As the path curves, the landscape shifts to a rockier terrain where massive boulders flank the way and the Erdtree moves toward the left of the frame. The scene then narrows as the character passes a solitary stone coffin and the trail hugs a steep cliff edge, with the open ruins falling behind in favor of denser forest vegetation. Finally, the camera continues along the winding precipice, bringing the glowing Erdtree into closer view as the path tightens against the drop.
